Teams are divided into 4 groups of 8. ** 12 matchdays. *** 6 matches per day. **** 3 matches per group. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} qualify for ''Challenge Finals''.
* '''Challenge Finals:''''' Febraury 16th - 18th, 2024 ** 16 teams. ** 18 matches (6 each day). ===Challenge Season Schedule=== {{box|start|padding=2em}} {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;margin:10px 0 0 10px" ! colspan=2| Tournament Schedule |- !
